name: Louisiana Creole Rabbit
recipeInstructions:
1. Cleaned rabbit (3 lb)
2. Salt (1 tsp)
3. Black pepper (1 tsp)
4. Cayenne pepper (½ tsp)
5. Onion, chopped (¼ cup)
6. Garlic, minced (3 cloves)
7. White vinegar (2 tbsp)
8. Browning sauce (1 tsp)
9. Mushrooms, drained (8 oz)
10. Butter or margarine, melted (2 tbsp)
11. Parsley, minced (1 tbsp)
12. Green bell pepper, minced (2 tbsp)
13. Green onions, chopped (2 tbsp)
14. White wine, dry (⅔ cup)
1. Dry the rabbit and place it in a bowl.
2. Combine salt, black pepper, cayenne pepper, onion, garlic, and vinegar; pour over rabbit, turning pieces to coat.
3. Cover the bowl and marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Transfer the rabbit and marinade to a well-greased baking dish.
5. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 1 hour.
6. Combine remaining ingredients and pour over rabbit.
7. Bake for an additional 30 to 45 minutes, until rabbit is fork-tender.
